message:
audit: batch 388 — deep re-audit of three_lane scheduler (6796L), circuit_breaker (1950L), retry (923L), session channel (708L) — all SOUND

Deep re-audits of critical concurrency and protocol modules:

- three_lane.rs: WakeState double-execution prevention, waker correctness,
  cancel propagation, Tarjan SCC deadlock detection, EXP3 adaptive cancel
  streak. Latent f64 overflow in EXP3 after ~700 epochs (degrades benignly
  to fixed limit=64). Confirmed SOUND.

- circuit_breaker.rs: Atomic u64 state machine bit packing, HalfOpen probe
  logic with epoch-based stale prevention, sliding window cleanup, CAS
  ordering pairs, cooldown recovery. Confirmed SOUND.

- retry.rs: Value-based policy chain (no shared state), cancel-clean drop,
  idempotency delegated to Policy trait, cooperative budget. Confirmed SOUND.

- session.rs: Protocol enforcement via move semantics, ObligationToken drop
  guard with double-panic suppression, cancel-correctness. Confirmed SOUND.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
